CommunityApplications.Profile:
Wealthfolio — a beautiful, open-source, **local-first** investment and net worth tracker.
This repository hosts the Unraid Community Apps template for the official `wealthfolio/wealthfolio` Docker image. Track portfolios across multiple accounts and asset types, import broker activities, set financial goals, and analyse performance — all stored in your own SQLite database with no cloud dependency.
- **Website:** https://wealthfolio.app - **Source:** https://github.com/wealthfolio/wealthfolio - **Self-hosting guide:** https://wealthfolio.app/docs/guide/self-hosting - **Support thread:** https://forums.unraid.net/topic/198598-afadil-wealthfolio/ - **Report a bug:** https://github.com/wealthfolio/wealthfolio/issues
